demo.title: urizen.sh
demo.code:
# Research any tokenized stock
curl "https://urizenfund.com/api/quant/fundamentals?symbol=NVDA"
curl "https://urizenfund.com/api/quant/ratings?symbol=NVDA"

# Macro + this week's economic calendar
curl https://urizenfund.com/api/quant/macro

# The fund's live book
curl https://urizenfund.com/api/fund/book

# A ready-to-sign buy of 0.01 ETH of $URI
curl "https://urizenfund.com/api/fund/quote?side=buy&amount=0.01&taker=0xYOURWALLET"

setup: No signup — every endpoint is public, key-less and CORS-open
Buy $URI: `@bankrbot buy $URI` — validate chain 4663 + the $URI address + router before signing
